items.summary: Fix the website background audio so the chainsaw loop is reliably audible for users, while still handling browser autoplay restrictions gracefully. The site must provide a clear user gesture path that starts playback successfully when autoplay is blocked, and once enabled the audio must continue looping across the session.
Add strobe/flash background effects on the Home page only (the #home hero section), matching the existing black-and-green horror style without reducing text readability.

Expand the Auditions section to include the new audition roles “Costume Manager” and “Masks Manager”, each with a short scary English description, while keeping the existing audition dates/hours and the existing roles list intact.
